name: rent-compass-uk
description: Evidence-led UK rental search, commute matching, listing comparison, and pre-commitment checks.

interface.shortDescription: Find and assess UK rentals before you commit
interface.longDescription: Build a renter profile, discover areas from real commutes, search and verify current listings, compare total costs, and prepare checks before signing or paying.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a UK rental search profile from my budget, dates, household, commutes, and preferences.
Find and compare current UK rental listings, showing evidence, total costs, commute assumptions, trade-offs, and unknowns.
Check this UK rental listing before I book a viewing, sign, or pay.
